meaning: adj.主教制度的,主教派的n.主教派的人,主教派会员,美国圣公会教徒,主教的,主教制的
examples: I was raised Episcopalian, and I was very religious as a kid.
That's like sending an Episcopalian to oversee the Vatican for 20 years.
He likes to pretend he's speaking in tongues in church. Episcopalian church.
And Episcopalian Bishop John Bryson Chane received the former president's body with a prayer.
McCain, who was raised an Episcopalian and now identifies himself as Baptist, rarely discusses his faith.
